title: Monthly Content Retainers
description: Strategy-led content marketing for Tampa businesses that need more than a camera crew. We help clarify the message, shape the offer, plan the communication, and execute with video, photography, editing, and social-ready assets.

faq.question: What is included in a monthly retainer?
faq.answer: Each retainer bundles strategy, production, editing, and delivery-ready assets. The exact mix depends on the tier, but the goal is consistent publishing and clearer messaging instead of one-off shoot days.

faq.question: Do you help with planning and distribution, not just filming?
faq.answer: Yes. Retainers are built around message clarity, shoot planning, editing, and handoff support so the content is usable for social, web, and campaign needs.

faq.question: What do you need from the client before filming starts?
faq.answer: A quick call to align on the offer, target audience, priorities, and monthly cadence is usually enough to start. From there, shoot dates, locations, and deliverables are mapped into a repeatable plan.

value.name: Starter Retainer
value.bestFor: Tampa businesses that need one solid monthly production day plus clearer messaging and a reliable content pipeline.
includes: One monthly shoot day up to 4 hours
Up to 8 vertical videos for Reels, Shorts, or TikTok
Light brand photography and b-roll capture
Messaging guidance, caption support, and publishing-ready exports
One monthly strategy and content planning call

value.name: Growth Retainer
value.bestFor: Brands that want weekly content, stronger visibility, and a partner who can guide both message and execution.
includes: Social media posting calendar, messaging direction, and handoff support
Photo assets for Google Business, website, and ads
Monthly performance review, content planning, and campaign guidance

value.name: Authority Retainer
value.bestFor: Established businesses that want an ongoing strategic content partner with priority booking.
includes: Up to four production blocks each month
Photography for brand, team, and location needs
Priority scheduling and quarterly strategy sessions with campaign direction
